ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* IATA airline code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airline is based */,
  "airline_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* IATA airport code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "airport_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "from_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "to_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (domestic or international) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the two airports */,
  "distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the route distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the flight operates on */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of arrival */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (non-stop or connecting) */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the price is for */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the flight */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (adult, child, infant) */,
  "price_class" TEXT /* Class of service (economy, business, first class) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "num_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking */,
  "booking_type" TEXT /* Type of booking (one-way or round-trip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (customer, agent, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the schedule is for */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Current status of the schedule */,
  "schedule_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the operator is for */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "operator_status" TEXT /* Current status of the operator */,
  "operator_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the operator information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_operators_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_prices_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the price is for */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the flight */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "price_history_status" TEXT /* Current status of the price history record */,
  "price_history_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the price history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_prices_history_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
